flags_raised: Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 36.9% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'transaction approved automatically without review' (40.4% match)

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it did not explicitly check against all applicable policy rules before generating its output.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring adherence to all financial policy rules, including obtaining necessary approvals for large or suspicious transactions, validating vendor identities, and logging all decisions with full reasoning trace.
remediation.constraint_added: Explicit validation against a comprehensive set of policy rules, including expenditure approval thresholds and fraud indicators.
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits of agent outputs against policy rules to detect and address potential compliance gaps.
Develop and integrate a hierarchical approval system for transactions that triggers human review based on predefined risk thresholds and policy rules.
Conduct thorough testing of the agent with simulated transactions that cover a wide range of scenarios, including those that test policy rule adherence and edge cases.

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
